results.rendered_html: ati-jagatī f. N. of a class of metres (belonging to those called aticchandas, and consisting of four lines, each containing thirteen syllables).

results.rendered_html: atijagatī (ati + jagatī) f. ein Metrum von 52 (4×13) Silben: prathamātijagatyāsāṃ (aticchandasāṃ) sā dvipañcāśadakṣarā  ṚV. PRĀT. 16,52 . Als Beispiel wird  ebend. 58 . bezeichnet  ṚV. 8,86,13 ; vgl.  COLEBR. Misc. Ess. II, 160 .  VS. Appendikṣ LX. LXIV.
